title: sedrila.yaml
description: Global configuration file for a sedrila course (see docs/authors.md §1.1)

name.description: Short title used in breadcrumb navigation.

chapterdir.description: Relative path of directory containing course content (chapters/taskgroups).

altdir.description: Relative path of alternate chapterdir for non-public instructor content.

stages.description: Ordered list of allowed 'stage:' values for tasks/taskgroups/chapters.

instructors.description: List of active instructors who can give students credit.

allowed_attempts.description: Max submission attempts per task. Format: 'n' or 'n + x/h'.

chapters.description: Course structure: list of chapters, each with a list of taskgroups.

baseresourcedir.description: Optional path to CSS/JS base resources. Defaults to built-in files.

itreedir.description: Relative path of instructor tree ZIP directory. Must end in '.zip'.

templatedir.description: Optional path to Jinja2 templates. Defaults to built-in templates.

blockmacro_topmatter.description: HTML text inserted before block content of SECTION/HINT/NOTICE/WARNING/INSTRUCTOR macros.

htaccess_template.description: Apache .htaccess template for restricting instructor website. Use {userlist_commas}, {userlist_spaces}, or {userlist_quotes_spaces} as placeholders.

student_yaml_attribute_prompts.description: Dictionary of attribute-name → prompt for populating student.yaml during 'sedrila student --init'.

participants.description: Configuration for generating an encrypted participants list (optional).

former_instructors.description: List of former instructors (same structure as instructors, but not shown to students).

startdate.description: First day of the course (ISO date format YYYY-MM-DD).

enddate.description: Last day of the course (ISO date format YYYY-MM-DD).

manual_bookings.description: Configuration for manual bookings: allowed reason types and an explanation URL.

types.description: List of allowed manual booking reason type names.

explanation_url.description: URL of a page explaining the manual booking types. Reason types link to #fragments on this page.

bonusrules.description: Optional bonus rules for rewarding steady course progress.

student_yaml_attribute.description: Name of the student.yaml attribute holding the student's course size in hours.

bonusperiod_type.description: Calendar period type: 'week' for ISO calendar week, 'month' for calendar month.

bonusperiods.description: Number of eligible periods (counting from the first) that can produce a bonus.

bonus_threshold_percent.description: Fraction of course_size_hours that must be done to get the bonus for a period.

bonus_size_percent.description: Fraction of course_size_hours deducted as bonus for each qualifying period.

nameish.description: Personal name or nickname of the instructor.

email.description: Email address to which students send submission requests.

gitaccount.description: Git server username used by the instructor for signing submission commits.

webaccount.description: Webserver username granted access to the instructor part of the website.

keyfingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the GPG key used by the instructor to sign commits.

pubkey.description: GPG public key block (PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK) used to validate instructor signatures.

status.description: Optional message about the instructor's current availability (supports YAML multiline).

file.description: Path to TAB-separated participants list file with column headers.

file_column.description: Column name in the participants file used to identify a participant.

student_attribute.description: Attribute name in student.yaml that corresponds to file_column.

name.description: Chapter directory name (also used as slug and heading).
Taskgroup directory name (also used as slug and heading).
